title: Notice of traffic: Diversion on Louis Fourie road
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic on Louis Fourie Road...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic on Louis Fourie Road will be switched over to the new seaside carriageway from the southern limit of construction (at The Lofts) to Beach East Road (at Vredebest) during the second week of April 2025. Traffic will operate in both directions on the new roadway and will be diverted back to the temporary widening at Vredebest.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Traffic on Louis Fourie Road will be switched over to the new seaside carriageway from the southern limit of construction (at The Lofts) to Beach East Road (at Vredebest) during the second week of April 2025. Traffic will operate in both directions on the new roadway and will be diverted back to the temporary widening at Vredebest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care-fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU.","html":"The Western Cape Government is working hard to maintain our roads. Please drive care-fully during this period of construction. Let us work together to ensure that our roads are safe, FOR YOU."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
